news.paragraph: Recent analyst activity shows a trend of upward price target adjustments for Airbnb, with Argus and Gordon Haskett both raising their projections. While Barclays also increased its target, its new projection remains below the current spot price. Traders should monitor international revenue trends as a key factor in the stock's valuation.
headlines: Argus Adjusts Price Target on Airbnb to $165 From $145, Maintains Buy Rating
Market Digest: NOV, SYK, PPC, ABNB, RDDT
Don't Overlook Airbnb (ABNB) International Revenue Trends While Assessing the Stock
Gordon Haskett Adjusts Airbnb Price Target to $146 From $136
Barclays Adjusts Price Target on Airbnb to $125 From $122
